title: Eschatology
description: A true Minecraft horror and terror experience.
body:
![Eschatology](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/966894232c1814da65cb54d97d914d62f2c8fdb8.png)

## Mankind is dead. Earth is rotten. Hide from it.

Eschatology is a beta-themed Minecraft modpack focusing on horror gameplay, achieving it through terror, atmosphere and harder gameplay. This modpack is meant for long sessions of gameplay.

You may enter in some bugs or unbalanced features, play with this in mind!

## Without spoiling much, it includes:
- Scarier Atmosphere
- Dense Forests
- New Structures
- Harder Mobs
- Snapshot-like Combat
- Well-Configured Dwellers and Creatures
..if you'd wish to spoil yourself, check the mods inside

## Credits for the projects outside of Modrinth
- [The Mangled Knocker](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/the-mangled-knocker) by [riverrflower](https://www.curseforge.com/members/riverrflower)
- [ True Cave Dweller](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/true-cave-dweller) by [condescending_williams93](https://www.curseforge.com/members/condescending_williams93) and [FrogBalloon](https://www.curseforge.com/members/frogballoon)
- [Thalassophobia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thalassophobia) by [Zcoper](https://www.curseforge.com/members/zcoper)
- [Cave Dweller Sound Overhaul](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cave-dweller-sound-overhaul) by [Scorchy](https://www.curseforge.com/members/scorchyskull/)
